Label: 10° grid cell (global BGC)
Notes: Globe footprint only — horizontal extent of one 10° cell in coarse global BGC models (e.g. HAMOCC, TOPAZ). No depth; pulled out in Box 1.

Label: Basin column
Notes: Full water column under one 10° BGC cell. L_v = mean ocean depth 4km. Extreme aspect ratio L_h/L_v = 250.

Label: 1° grid cell (mesoscale BGC)
Notes: Horizontal extent of 1° eddy-permitting BGC cell (e.g. PISCES/NEMO, BEC/MOM). L_v = thermocline base ~1km.

Label: 0.1° grid cell (eddy-resolving)
Notes: Eddy-resolving BGC cell. L_v = mixed layer depth ~100m. Still strongly stratified — vertical exchange parameterized.

Label: Coastal/regional cell
Notes: High-resolution coastal model cell. L_v = near-surface layer ~10m.

Label: LES outer scale
Notes: Large-Eddy Simulation outer scale. Stratification still suppresses vertical motions. Approaching Ozmidov scale.

Label: Ozmidov scale (isotropic onset)
Notes: Ozmidov scale L_o = sqrt(ε/N³) ≈ 10m for typical ocean (ε~10⁻⁹ m²/s³, N~10⁻² rad/s). Below this, buoyancy no longer suppresses turbulence — motions become isotropic.

Label: LES resolved / DNS
Notes: Fully isotropic turbulence. Resolved in DNS; subgrid in most LES.

Label: Kolmogorov scale
Notes: Kolmogorov microscale η = (ν³/ε)^(1/4) ≈ 1mm in ocean. Viscosity dissipates turbulent kinetic energy. No smaller turbulent motions.

Label: Cellular / molecular
Notes: Cellular scale ~1µm. Molecular diffusion dominant. Gene expression, enzyme kinetics, nutrient uptake.
